title: Plan a land-based carbon farming project
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan a land-based carbon farming project demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Carry out preliminary planning activities

pcs.text: Establish eligibility to participate in the target carbon market method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish eligibility to participate in the target carbon market method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish eligibility to participate in the target carbon market method.

pcs.text: Identify the project site/s including elements and features that will influence the project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the project site/s including elements and features that will influence the project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the project site/s including elements and features that will influence the project.

pcs.text: Ascertain determined rights to land and project boundaries
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ascertain determined rights to land and project boundaries?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ascertain determined rights to land and project boundaries.

pcs.text: Identify the approved carbon farming method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the approved carbon farming method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the approved carbon farming method.

pcs.text: Identify how reductions in emissions and/or carbon storage will be measured for the method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify how reductions in emissions and/or carbon storage will be measured for the method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify how reductions in emissions and/or carbon storage will be measured for the method.

pcs.text: Determine the regulatory requirements of the method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the regulatory requirements of the method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the regulatory requirements of the method.

pcs.text: Seek free, prior and informed consent of people or organisations who hold an eligible interest in site/s
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek free, prior and informed consent of people or organisations who hold an eligible interest in site/s?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek free, prior and informed consent of people or organisations who hold an eligible interest in site/s.

pcs.text: Undertake preliminary cost-benefit analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake preliminary cost-benefit analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake preliminary cost-benefit analysis.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Carry out preliminary planning activities

elements.title: Prepare and develop the plan

pcs.text: Identify responsibilities of owning and managing a carbon farming project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify responsibilities of owning and managing a carbon farming project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify responsibilities of owning and managing a carbon farming project.

pcs.text: Identify advisory services, management, governance and technical services required to implement project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify advisory services, management, governance and technical services required to implement project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify advisory services, management, governance and technical services required to implement project.

pcs.text: Identify equipment, tools and labour required to implement project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify equipment, tools and labour required to implement project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify equipment, tools and labour required to implement project.

pcs.text: Identify project risks and establish controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify project risks and establish controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify project risks and establish controls.

pcs.text: Prepare project timelines and key work tasks, taking seasonal factors and interdependencies into account
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare project timelines and key work tasks, taking seasonal factors and interdependencies into account?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare project timelines and key work tasks, taking seasonal factors and interdependencies into account.

pcs.text: Plan reporting and auditing schedules to comply with requirements of method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan reporting and auditing schedules to comply with requirements of method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan reporting and auditing schedules to comply with requirements of method.

pcs.text: Identify circumstances under which the market regulator will issue carbon credits or offsets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify circumstances under which the market regulator will issue carbon credits or offsets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify circumstances under which the market regulator will issue carbon credits or offsets.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare and develop the plan

elements.title: Cost implementation of project

pcs.text: Obtain current prices for equipment, technology, labour and advisory services to implement method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain current prices for equipment, technology, labour and advisory services to implement method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain current prices for equipment, technology, labour and advisory services to implement method.

pcs.text: Calculate overall costs to implement project
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate overall costs to implement project?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate overall costs to implement project.

pcs.text: Prepare an abatement estimate utilising method calculation, approved tool or expert advice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare an abatement estimate utilising method calculation, approved tool or expert advice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare an abatement estimate utilising method calculation, approved tool or expert advice.

pcs.text: Prepare return on investment analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare return on investment analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare return on investment analysis.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Cost implementation of project

elements.title: Present project plan

pcs.text: Finalise project plan according to audit requirements of method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Finalise project plan according to audit requirements of method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Finalise project plan according to audit requirements of method.

pcs.text: Present plan to stakeholder for approval to participate in the targeted carbon market
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present plan to stakeholder for approval to participate in the targeted carbon market?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present plan to stakeholder for approval to participate in the targeted carbon market.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Present project plan

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
